rationale: Review 1's approve yields the better PR, as the shown diff's module docstring already names the single central Mathlib import providing the Hopf instance (TensorProduct) and the added API is just naming/wrappers around it; Review 2's 'findings' are unmaterial nits (private helper adapting a general convolution pattern + transitive Bialgebra reexports) whose docstring edits are a contested preference no maintainer would require, wasting effort.
